title: Where Is the Love?
why_this_song: Where Is the Love? by Black Eyed Peas (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "What's wrong with the world, mama?"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "People livin' like they ain't got no mamas"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Father, Father, Father, help us"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "What's wrong with the world, mama?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Let your soul gravitate to the love, y'all, y'all"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where is the love, the love, the love?
It just ain't the same, old ways have changed

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What's wrong with the world, mama?
Wrong information always shown by the media

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: People livin' like they ain't got no mamas
'Cause people got me, got me questionin'
That's the reason why sometimes I'm feelin' under

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Where Is the Love?", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Where Is the Love?", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Where Is the Love?" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Where Is the Love?" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Where Is the Love?" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Where Is the Love?", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
